name: @quoin/pattern-combobox
description: Combobox pattern. A single-line text input paired with a popup listbox of suggestions. The text input is editable; the listbox provides selectable options that filter as the user types (or remain static, depending on variant). Translation from W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. Phase 22.7.

source.translationFraming: transitional — to be retired in favor of native specification publication if ARIA APG publishes Quoin IR for this pattern
